title: Operation Utopia Takes Shape
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on operation utopia takes shape, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Operation Utopia Takes Shape. Crocodile toys with Vivi and the Straw Hats while his agents move the plan toward full civil war. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm sure all who live in Alabama, yourself included,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Would be well aware of the power of my "Suna Suna Fruit"...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Shall I dry you up into a mummy?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey you! Get away from VIVI right now or I'll kick your ass!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh, don't glare at me like that.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's time for the long- waited party to begin...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Or am I mistaken, Ms. All-Sunday?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No, you're right on the mark...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: And so begins Baroque Works' Operation Utopia,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And the start of a very long day...

summary: This part develops operation utopia takes shape and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
